name: Ronin Bridge Exploiter (Lazarus Group)
notes: Axie Infinity Ronin Bridge exploit, Mar 2022. $625M stolen. Attributed to DPRK Lazarus Group.

name: Nomad Bridge — Primary Exploiter
notes: Nomad Bridge crowd-looting exploit, Aug 2022. $190M total loss.

name: Nomad Bridge — Exploiter Contract
notes: Nomad Bridge exploit contract deployed by attacker.

name: Wormhole Bridge Exploiter
notes: Wormhole Bridge exploit, Feb 2022. $326M stolen. Attacker holds ~94k ETH.

name: Harmony Horizon Bridge — Primary Exploiter
notes: Harmony Horizon Bridge exploit, Jun 2022. $100M stolen. Attributed to Lazarus Group.

name: Harmony Horizon Bridge — Secondary Exploiter
notes: Secondary address used in Harmony Horizon Bridge exploit.

name: Wintermute Exploiter
notes: Wintermute market maker exploit, Sep 2022. $160M stolen via Profanity vanity address vulnerability.

name: Wintermute — Attack Contract
notes: Contract deployed by Wintermute attacker to execute exploit.

name: Euler Finance — Primary Exploiter
notes: Euler Finance flash loan attack, Mar 2023. $196M stolen. Majority returned.

name: Euler Finance — Exploit Contract 1
notes: First exploit contract used in Euler Finance attack.

name: Euler Finance — Exploit Contract 2
notes: Second exploit contract used in Euler Finance attack.

name: Harmony — Compromised Validator Multisig 1
notes: Compromised validator multisig key used in Harmony Horizon Bridge exploit.

name: Harmony — Compromised Validator Multisig 2
notes: Compromised validator multisig key used in Harmony Horizon Bridge exploit.
